assertions.text: uses_gh_cli: Used gh issue list Bash commands (not browser/web search)
assertions.evidence: Used gh issue list and gh issue view extensively to research issues

assertions.text: searches_before_text: First non-read action was a gh search, not a text response
assertions.evidence: First action was ToolSearch for WebFetch tool schema — gh searches came after

assertions.text: offers_to_react: Explicitly asked user if they want to 👍 issues
assertions.evidence: Instead of offering to react on user's behalf, gave URLs for manual upvoting or raw gh command to copy-paste — no explicit offer to do it for them
